# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The elizaos-plugins/registry repository saw activity focused on expanding multi-chain payment capabilities through a new community contribution. There were no code changes, bug fixes, or documentation updates merged during this period.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **No completed work reported for this date.**

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#352](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/352): Add @algovoi/plugin-elizaos — Introduces multi-chain A2A (Agent-to-Agent) payment functionality supporting 7 different chains.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
